alkylation reagent: alkylated with 40 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature in the dark for 60 min
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C with modified trypsin
collision energy: ion fragmentation using collision-induced dissociation (CID) with normalized collision energy of 35%
instrument: coupled online with an LTQ-Orbitrap Elite™ mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides were ionized by Nanospray Flex™ ion source
labeling: the proteomic analysis of the T. dimidiata saliva
reduction reagent: reduced with 20 mM dithiothreitol at 56 °C for 45 min
